description: Register a Delta Lake IO manager pointed at MinIO for S3-compatible lakehouse storage

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

access_key_env_var.label: Access Key Env Var
access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MinIO access key

secret_key_env_var.label: Secret Key Env Var
secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MinIO secret key

bucket.label: Bucket
bucket.description: S3/MinIO bucket to store Delta tables in

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: Key prefix within the bucket for asset tables
